kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep those pests at bay and your schedule full. Ready to manage your treatments and grow your client base?

quickActions.label: Schedule a treatment
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new pest control treatment for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for pest control service.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What pest control jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a pest control business. You help manage initial inspections, recurring treatment plans, coordinate technicians, handle estimates for residential and commercial pest services, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We're here to help you with any pest problems. Are you dealing with a current pest issue or looking to schedule a routine treatment?
commonReasons: Follow up on a previous treatment

steps.title: Name your pest control business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your technicians operate.

steps.title: Add your pest services
steps.body: List the types of pests you treat: termites, rodents, ants, bed bugs, mosquitoes, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing for one-time treatments, recurring plans, and inspections.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign and schedule treatment jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your pest control business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking treatments!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a pest control business.
capabilities: Create estimates for pest control services
Track recurring treatment plans and renewal dates
Send automated reminders for upcoming treatments
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Track chemical usage and compliance documentation
Analyze revenue by pest type and service plan
